---
title: "Margaret Anne Dyer"
---

## Margaret Anne Dyer

**Dates:** (b.1857/8)

**Maiden name:** (Macmillan)

### Description

daughter of Alexander Macmillan

### Biography

She married (1889) Louis Dyer (1851-1908), an American professor of Greek who settled in Oxford.  She seems to have been a member of the Gosling Society, perhaps only for a short time. See the husband\'s obituary, <i>The Times</i> (21 July 1908).

### Letters

- Letter from April 26th 1880
- Letter from Sept 9th [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
